mapper.select: select config_option_id, config_group_id, option_name, option_value, extra_price, sort_order, is_default, create_time from sys_product_config_option where config_group_id = #{configGroupId} order by sort_order
mapper.insert: insert into sys_product_config_option (config_group_id, option_name, option_value, extra_price, sort_order, is_default, create_time) values (#{configGroupId}, #{optionName}, #{optionValue}, #{extraPrice}, #{sortOrder}, #{isDefault}, sysdate())
